languages.text: Символы, начертанные на земле, не несут в себе и капли колдовской мощи. Их автор пытался воззвать к Богу-Императору и силам варпа одновременно, не зная как делается ни первое, ни последнее.
The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.
languages.original_text: Символы, начертанные на земле, не несут в себе и капли колдовской мощи. Их автор пытался воззвать к Богу-Императору и силам варпа одновременно, не зная как делается ни первое, ни последнее.

traits.locale_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their author attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, ignorant of how to do either.
The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

Carved into the ground are occult symbols and something in High Gothic mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor — a pitiful attempt to imitate the prayer services of the Astropaths and their litanies of focus.
The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their author attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, ignorant of how to do either.
The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

languages.text: 地面には、オカルトのシンボルやハイゴシックの要素が混ざった神皇帝への祈りが刻まれている。これは、アストロパスの祈りの儀式や集中のための祈りを模倣しようとする、哀れな試みである。
languages.original_text: Carved into the ground are occult symbols and something in High Gothic mixed with invocations to the God-Emperor — a pitiful attempt to imitate the prayer services of the Astropaths and their litanies of focus.

traits.locale_text: 地面には、オカルトのシンボルやハイゴシックの要素が混ざった神皇帝への祈りが刻まれている。これは、アストロパスの祈りの儀式や集中のための祈りを模倣しようとする、哀れな試みである。

languages.text: Yerdeki sembollerin hiçbir sahirlik gücü yok. Onları çizen, hem Tanrı İmparator'a hem de öteboyut güçlerine yakarmaya çalışmış ancak ikisini de becerememiş.
languages.original_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

traits.locale_text: Yerdeki sembollerin hiçbir sahirlik gücü yok. Onları çizen, hem Tanrı İmparator'a hem de öteboyut güçlerine yakarmaya çalışmış ancak ikisini de becerememiş.

languages.text: Los símbolos del suelo no albergan poder alguno. Su creador intentó invocar tanto al Dios Emperador como los poderes de la disformidad, pero no supo hacer ni una cosa ni la otra.
languages.original_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

traits.locale_text: Los símbolos del suelo no albergan poder alguno. Su creador intentó invocar tanto al Dios Emperador como los poderes de la disformidad, pero no supo hacer ni una cosa ni la otra.

languages.text: 地上的这些符号没有任何巫术力量。刻下它们的人试图同时呼唤神皇和亚空间之力，但显然对两者都一窍不通。
languages.original_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

traits.locale_text: 地上的这些符号没有任何巫术力量。刻下它们的人试图同时呼唤神皇和亚空间之力，但显然对两者都一窍不通。

languages.text: Les symboles gravés sur le sol ne recèlent pas de sorcellerie. La personne qui les a inscrits ici voulait invoquer aussi bien l'Empereur-Dieu que les puissances du Warp, mais ignorait comment s'y prendre.
languages.original_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

traits.locale_text: Les symboles gravés sur le sol ne recèlent pas de sorcellerie. La personne qui les a inscrits ici voulait invoquer aussi bien l'Empereur-Dieu que les puissances du Warp, mais ignorait comment s'y prendre.

languages.text: Die Symbole auf dem Boden haben keine magischen Kräfte. Ihr Schöpfer hat versucht, den Gottimperator und die Kräfte des Warp anzurufen, wusste aber nicht wie.
languages.original_text: The symbols on the ground hold no sorcerous power. Their creator attempted to invoke both the God-Emperor and the forces of the warp, but was ignorant of how to do either.

traits.locale_text: Die Symbole auf dem Boden haben keine magischen Kräfte. Ihr Schöpfer hat versucht, den Gottimperator und die Kräfte des Warp anzurufen, wusste aber nicht wie.
